---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for nano-review
labels: enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What limitation are you encountering?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the desired solution in detail. Include:
- Expected behavior/usage
- API changes (if any)
- Configuration changes (if any)
- UI/UX changes (if applicable)

## Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered and why they weren't chosen.

## Additional Context
Related issues, pull requests, screenshots, mockups, or examples of similar features in other projects.
